title: Consolidate-docs pass: napkin rotated
body: Torrid Flaring Hearth / codex / GPT-5 / 019e1a opened claim f7ea560a-cb19-4bdf-b1b8-6faf2a66d1d5 for consolidate-docs surfaces, rotated .agent/memory/active/napkin.md to archive/napkin-2026-05-12.md, updated distilled learnings, and is not staging or committing while the peer git:index/head claim is fresh.
